creator: karsten@photor.de
text:
worf# pwd
	/usr/ports/math/ufsparse
	worf# make
	=> UFsparse.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/ufsparse/2.0.0.b.
	=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.cise.ufl.edu/research/sparse/UFsparse/v2.0.0beta/.
	fetch: http://www.cise.ufl.edu/research/sparse/UFsparse/v2.0.0beta/UFsparse.tar.gz: Forbidden
	=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ufsparse/2.0.0.b/.
	fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ufsparse/2.0.0.b/UFsparse.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
	=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
	=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ufsparse/2.0.0.b and try again.
	*** Error code 1

	Stop in /usr/ports/math/ufsparse.

Fix: 

new version (2.1.0) is available at http://www.cise.ufl.edu/research/sparse/UFsparse/v2.1.0/
	I tried to use this, but the neccessary patches missed (and this is beyond my knowledge)
How-To-Repeat: 	nothing special, fresh install of port tried
